## Changements

## Type

- [ ] feat

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` OK (ruff check + ruff format --check)
- [ ] `make typecheck` OK (mypy strict)
- [ ] `make test` OK (couverture >= 75%)
- [ ] Documentation mise a jour si necessaire (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Pas de secret commite
